title: uDisplay UI Definition
description: Schema for uDisplay YAML UI definitions. Validated by `udisplay-gen validate`. Widget IDs are assigned by codegen (not declared in YAML). Maximum 240 user widgets per device (IDs 0x10–0xFF); codegen fails if this limit is exceeded.

device.description: Device metadata. Used in the Qt client's discovery list and connection screen.

name.description: Human-readable device name shown in the Qt client discovery list.

version.description: Firmware version string (informational only, not parsed by client).

description.description: Optional device description shown in the client detail view.

capabilities.description: Optional list of capability hint strings. Reserved for future use — the client currently accepts any capability string (kKnownCapabilities is empty; check is a no-op). Will gate features requiring a minimum client version once the first official release ships.

widgetMap.description: Named widget or container map. Names become C macro suffixes. Rendered in declaration order. Names must be globally unique across all container scopes.

propertyNames.description: Names must be lowercase snake_case identifiers.

widgetOrContainer.description: Any valid widget or layout container. The `type` field is the discriminator.

widget.description: Alias for widgetOrContainer — preserved for backward compatibility.

flexProp.description: Layout weight within a row or grid container. Integer >= 1. Omit for auto-width (the widget sizes to its own content and does not stretch).

alignProp.description: Content alignment within a row or grid cell, used when the item does not stretch to fill it (flex: omitted, or extra space remains). Omit to inherit the parent row/grid's own align (or "left" if the parent didn't set one either).

labelAlignProp.description: Text alignment within a label widget. Default: "left".

displayWidget.description: Numeric read-only display. Renders the latest value pushed by the device via STATE_UPDATE. No user interaction.

label.description: Text label shown above or beside the value.

unit.description: Unit suffix shown to the right of the value (e.g. "V", "°C", "Hz").

format.description: printf-style format string applied to the raw float value before display (e.g. "%.2f", "%d", "%.1f"). Default: "%.2f".

style.description: Rendering style. `large` renders as a full-width hero block with a 32px bold value — intended for primary instrument readings.

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

ledWidget.description: Boolean indicator LED. Can be used standalone (renders as a dot + label row) or as a child of a `button` (renders inline within the button face). State is always device-authoritative — driven by STATE_UPDATE only, never optimistically flipped by the client.

label.description: Text label shown beside the LED dot (standalone) or on the button face (child). Omit for icon-only use.

color.description: Active (on) color of the LED dot as a 6-digit hex color (e.g. "#ff0000" for red). Default: "#00d4aa". The inactive (off) color is always fixed (#2a2a4a).

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

rgbledWidget.description: Full-colour RGB LED indicator. State is a packed 24-bit integer (0x00RRGGBB) pushed by the device via STATE_UPDATE (VAL_INT32). Value 0 renders the LED as off (#2a2a4a). No user interaction.

label.description: Text label shown beside the LED dot.

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

buttonFaceChild.description: A widget allowed inline on a button's face. Restricted to passive/decorative leaf types plus `row`/`grid` for multi-widget or vertical face layouts — no interactive controls (toggle, slider, text, dropdown, button, button-group), which would create overlapping touch targets with the button's own tap handling. The restriction applies recursively: a nested `row`/`grid`'s own `widgets:` are just as restricted, at every depth.

buttonFaceWidgetMap.description: Named widget map for a button face or a container nested inside one — restricted to buttonFaceChild types, enforced recursively (every nested row/grid's own widgets: uses this same map, not the unrestricted top-level widgetMap).

buttonFaceRowContainer.description: Horizontal layout container scoped to a button face. Same as `row`, but its `widgets:` is recursively restricted to buttonFaceChild types instead of the unrestricted top-level widgetMap.

buttonFaceGridContainer.description: Grid layout container scoped to a button face. Same as `grid`, but its `widgets:` is recursively restricted to buttonFaceChild types instead of the unrestricted top-level widgetMap.

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid. Minimum 1 (columns: 1 renders as a single-column stacked layout).

buttonWidget.description: Momentary push button. Sends a `button_press` EVENT to the device on tap. No optimistic state — the device drives any resulting state change via STATE_UPDATE. Supports optional child widgets (led, rgbled, display, label, or a nested row/grid of those) rendered inline, at compact scale, on the button face. Button color is controlled globally via the top-level `style:` block (`button` token).

label.description: Text label on the button face.

shape.description: Button shape. `rect` = rounded rectangle (default). `circle` = circular (use for icon/action buttons). `square` = square (use for gamepad-style layouts).

widgets.description: Optional child widgets rendered inline on the button face — led, rgbled, display, label, or a nested row/grid of those (recursively restricted to the same types). Any number of children (matches the client's existing rendering support).

buttonGroupWidget.description: Exclusive-select button group. Exactly one item is active at a time. Sends a `button_press` EVENT with the selected item's widget_id when the selection changes. Renders as a segmented control (grid layout) or directional pad (dpad layout).

label.description: Optional group label shown above the button group.

layout.description: `grid` = items laid out in a wrapping grid (default). `dpad` = classic 5-position directional pad (cross shape); items must specify `position` (top/right/bottom/left/center).

items.description: Named selectable items. Each item gets its own widget_id assigned by codegen. For `dpad` layout, each item must specify a `position`. Minimum 2 items required.

buttonGroupItem.description: A single selectable item within a button-group.

label.description: Text label shown on the item button.

position.description: Position within a `dpad` layout. Required when the parent button-group has `layout: dpad`. Ignored for `grid` layout.

sliderWidget.description: Numeric read-write slider. The client sends a `slider_change` EVENT when the user releases the slider. The device sends STATE_UPDATE to confirm the accepted value (which may differ from the requested value if the device clamps or quantizes).

label.description: Text label shown above the slider.

max.description: Maximum slider value (inclusive). Must be greater than `min`.

step.description: Slider step increment. Must be positive. Default: 1.

unit.description: Unit suffix shown beside the current value (e.g. "Hz", "ms").

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

toggleWidget.description: Boolean read-write toggle switch. The client sends a `toggle_change` EVENT on user interaction. The device sends STATE_UPDATE to confirm the new state. No optimistic flip — the widget stays in its current visual state until the device confirms.

label.description: Text label shown beside the toggle.

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

textWidget.description: String widget. In `ro` mode renders the device-pushed string value. In `rw` mode renders an editable text field; the client sends a `text_submit` EVENT when the user confirms input (keyboard Done key or submit button) — not on every keystroke.

label.description: Text label shown above the field.

mode.description: `ro` = display-only (default). `rw` = editable; submits on keyboard confirm.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in the field when empty (rw mode only).

maxlength.description: Maximum character count the user can enter (rw mode only). Enforced client-side. Default: 255.

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

dropdownWidget.description: Compact exclusive-select dropdown. Renders as a collapsed label+chevron row, expands to a scrollable item list. The device sends STATE_UPDATE (VAL_UINT8, index) to set the current selection. The client sends a SELECTION_CHANGE EVENT (widget_id + uint8 index) when the user picks a new item. Requires capabilities: [dropdown].

label.description: Text label shown above the collapsed dropdown row.

items.description: Ordered map of key → display label pairs. The selection index (sent in STATE_UPDATE and SELECTION_CHANGE) is the 0-based position in YAML declaration order. Items do NOT get individual widget IDs — only the dropdown itself gets one. Minimum 2 items.

debug_state.description: Design-mode preview value. Ignored when YAML originates from a real device.

labelWidget.description: Static text decoration. Renders a heading, body, or caption text block set in YAML. No widget ID assigned — no protocol exchange. Requires capabilities: [label].

style.description: Text style. `heading` = bold, larger. `body` = normal weight (default). `caption` = small, muted.

separatorWidget.description: Horizontal visual divider. No widget ID assigned — no protocol exchange. Requires capabilities: [label].

sectionContainer.description: Named collapsible group container. Children get widget IDs as if they were top-level (section name excluded from ID path). Requires capabilities: [layout-v2].

collapsible.description: Whether the section can be collapsed by the user. Default: false.

rowContainer.description: Horizontal layout container. Children are laid out left-to-right with optional flex weights. Container name excluded from child ID paths. Requires capabilities: [layout-v2].

gridContainer.description: Grid layout container. Children are placed left-to-right, wrapping at `columns` items per row. Container name excluded from child ID paths. Requires capabilities: [layout-v2].

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid. Minimum 1 (columns: 1 renders as a single-column ColumnWidget-style layout).

colorToken.description: A CSS hex color value (#rgb, #rrggbb, #rrggbbaa) or the keyword 'transparent'.

styleTokenSet.description: A named set of color tokens. All fields are optional — unspecified tokens inherit from the `default` theme (or C++ hardcoded defaults if no `default` is present).

led_on.description: LED fill color when on (button face dot). Default: #ffffff

led_off.description: LED fill color when off (button face dot). Default: transparent

led_border.description: LED dot border (button face dot). Default: #ffffff

styleBlock.description: Optional top-level style block. Defines one or more named themes as sets of color tokens. The `default` theme sets the base that all other themes cascade from. Firmware switches themes via a TBD protocol mechanism (TODO-027). Invalid color strings are silently ignored by the client.

propertyNames.description: Theme names must be lowercase snake_case identifiers.
